    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected String
    DefaultSqlDialect.tupleExpression(Operator operator, List<SequencedMap<String,Object>> values, Function<Object,String> parameterFunction)
    Builds a tuple expression by composing column names and values into row value constructor syntax.

  • Uses of Operator in st.orm.core.template

    Methods in st.orm.core.template with parameters of type Operator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.having(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a HAVING clause to the query using the specified expression.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.havingAny(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a HAVING clause to the query using the specified expression.
    default String
    SqlDialect.multiColumnExpression(Operator operator, List<SequencedMap<String,Object>> values, Function<Object,String> parameterFunction)
    Builds a multi-column expression for the given operator.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<? extends V> it)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.
    final <V> QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
    QueryBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.
    static <V> Element
    Templates.where(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<? extends V> it)
    Generates a WHERE clause based on the provided path, operator, and iterable of values or records.
    static <V> Element
    Templates.where(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Generates a WHERE clause based on the provided path, operator, and values or records.
    abstract <V> PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<? extends V> it)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.
    final <V> PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.where(Metamodel<T,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph.
    abstract <V> PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereAny(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, Iterable<? extends V> it)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.
    final <V> PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereAny(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, V... o)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.
    protected abstract <V> PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
    WhereBuilder.whereImpl(Metamodel<?,V> path, Operator operator, V[] o)
    Adds a condition to the WHERE clause that matches the specified objects at the specified path in the table graph or manually added joins.

    PredicateBuilder<T,R,?>

    PredicateBuilder<T,R,?>

    Creates a new instance of PredicateBuilder for the specified path, operator, and values.

    PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
